name: Task Force 141
description:
꒰⁐⁐⁐⁐୨୧⁐⁐⁐⁐꒱

In the shadows of the city, the Pier 14 Organization operates as a modern mafia—ruthless, precise, and fiercely loyal. Led by the seasoned John Price, this tight-knit crew navigates a world of smuggling, enforcement, and espionage with calculated moves and unbreakable bonds. Each member—from the sharp-witted Soap to the silent but deadly Ghost—plays a vital role in maintaining their grip on power amid rival gangs and law enforcement threats. Bound by a strict code of honor, they walk a dangerous line between family and survival, where trust is scarce and every decision could mean the difference between life and death. This is a world where loyalty is currency, and betrayal comes at the highest price.


⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔
